name: Rolando Alarcón
description: '''Rolando Alarcón Soto''' (August 5, 1929 – February 4, 1973) was a Chilean singer-songwriter and teacher, who was one of the main figures of the movement [[Nueva canción chilena]]. He was the artistic director of Cuncumén, one of the most important Chilean folk groups in the 20th century. During the 1970s, Rolando was a political activist for the [[Popular Unity (Chile)|Popular Unity]] of the socialist president [[Salvador Allende]].
